name: Chicken Thighs Marengo
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from the chicken.
2. Rinse the chicken with cold water and pat dry.
3. Place the chicken in a shallow container. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
4. Coat a large skillet with cooking spray; add olive oil. Place over medium-high heat until hot.
5. Add the chicken to the skillet and cook 2-3 minutes on each side until lightly browned. Remove the chicken from the skillet and drain on paper towels.
6. Wipe the skillet dry with a paper towel. Recoat the skillet with cooking spray; place over medium-high heat until hot.
7. Add mushrooms and cook 2 minutes, stirring frequently. Remove the mushrooms from the skillet and set aside.
8. Recoat the skillet with cooking spray; place over medium-high heat until hot. Add green onions and garlic; sauté 1 minute.
9. Stir in wine and thyme. Add the reserved chicken. Bring the mixture to a boil.
10. Cover; reduce heat, and simmer for 25 minutes. Add the reserved mushrooms and tomato wedges; simmer 2 more minutes or until thoroughly heated.
11. Sprinkle with parsley and serve immediately.
